name: Nam Phrik Kaeng Som (Sour Soup Curry Paste) E
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chilies in hot water for 15 minutes and remove them.
2. Place all ingredients except the shrimp paste into a blender.
3. Blend until well mixed.
4. Add the shrimp paste and blend once more to achieve a fine-textured paste.
5. Store the paste in a glass jar in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 months.
(Note: Krachai is related to ginger and galangal, typically used in fish dishes.)
Recipe from: The Elegant Taste of Thailand by Sisamon Kongpan & Pinyo Srisawat.
